docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-08-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF MAY-18-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BALENBIN EVELYN AS TO DEFENDANT RAVETTI DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALENBIN EVELYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAVETTI DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID SERVICE AS TO DAVID RAVETTI, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
